title: Energy Security In A Dangerous World
summary: Iran’s closure of the Strait of Hormuz exposed the reality that the world is undergoing an unexpected energy transition—not from fossil fuels to renewables, but from a free and open energy commons to one dominated by geography, military threats, and the hard reality that national security has become inseparable from energy security.
